description:
We are seeking a Senior Product Manager with 5–9 years of experience to lead product strategy and execution for our SaaS platform. The ideal candidate has strong analytical skills, experience working with cross-functional teams, and a track record of delivering successful digital products.

Key Responsibilities:
- Define and own the product vision, strategy, and roadmap aligned with business goals
- Gather and prioritize product and customer requirements
- Write detailed product requirement documents (PRDs) and user stories
- Collaborate closely with engineering, design, and data teams
- Drive end-to-end product lifecycle from ideation to launch and iteration
- Analyze user behavior, product metrics, and market trends to inform decisions
- Conduct A/B testing and experiments to improve product performance
- Work with stakeholders across business, marketing, and sales teams
- Monitor product KPIs and continuously optimize performance
- Lead sprint planning, backlog grooming, and agile ceremonies

Required Qualifications:
- 5–9 years of experience in product management or related roles
- Strong analytical and problem-solving skills
- Experience with Agile/Scrum methodologies
- Proven experience delivering customer-facing products
- Ability to work with data and metrics (SQL, dashboards, analytics tools)
- Strong communication and stakeholder management skills

Preferred Qualifications:
- Experience in SaaS, fintech, or B2B platforms
- Familiarity with tools like Jira, Confluence, Amplitude, Mixpanel
- Technical background or prior experience in software engineering
- Experience working in high-growth or startup environments

Soft Skills:
- Strong leadership and ownership mindset
- Ability to handle ambiguity and make data-driven decisions
- Excellent collaboration and communication skills

Education:
- MBA or equivalent experience preferred

Nice to Have:
- Experience with growth or experimentation frameworks
- Exposure to UX/UI design principles
- Experience working with global teams

Keywords for ATS:
Product Management, Product Strategy, Roadmap, PRD, Agile, Scrum, Stakeholder Management, SaaS, SQL, Data Analysis, A/B Testing, Product Lifecycle, User Research
